# Shoppers Stop BLACK Credit Card
Rewarding Style, Ready for you
  * 7% Reward Points On Shoppers Stop Purchases
  * Welcome Voucher Worth ₹1,500
  * Shoppers Stop Black Membership

### Detailed benefits break-up
Get cashback benefits on your Shoppers Stop spends.
₹12,600
Get Shoppers Stop welcome voucher.
₹1,500
Get complimentary Shoppers Stop Silver Edge membership.
₹4,500
Get weekend offers on spends of single purchase of ₹15,000.
₹6,000
Get cashback benefits on other spends.

₹17,776
Get 8 complimentary international lounge accesses.

[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=FCBH&dedupe=N&mc_id=website_organic_shoppers_stop_prod_pg_sticky_footer&icid=website_organic_shoppers_stop_prod_pg_sticky_footer#nbb "Apply Now")
More benefits than ever before 
Welcome Benefits
  * Shoppers Stop voucher worth ₹1500 as welcome benefit on any transaction at Shoppers Stop


Shopping Benefits
  * 7% Reward Points on every Shoppers Stop purchase and 2% Reward Points on every non-Shoppers Stop purchase


Lounge Benefits
  * 16 domestic lounge accesses (4 per quarter) and 8 international lounge accesses (2 per quarter) per calendar year.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-black-credit-card#a "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits 
### Lifestyle Benefits
  * Complimentary Shoppers Stop Black membership worth ₹4,500
  * Reward Points worth ₹2,000 per month for a purchase of ₹50,000 or above on Shoppers Stop on weekends
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver


View More 
![Shoppers Stop Black Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Insurance Benefits
  * Accidental air death cover worth ₹3 crore
  * Emergency overseas hospitalisation up to ₹50 lakh


![Shoppers Stop Black Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Ability to convert large transactions to a SmartEMI after purchase
  * Contactless payments* to improve your purchase experience
  * Protection against fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card*
  * Simple card management via HDFC Bank MyCards
  * Credit liability cover up to ₹9 lakh


View More 
![Shoppers Stop Black Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible? 
Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** 21 – 60 years 
  * **Income (Monthly):** ₹70,000 


Self Employed
  * **Nationality** : Indian
  * **Age** : 21 – 65 years 
  * **Annual Income** > ₹8,40,000 


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Save big every year—just like countless Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card holders. 
[Calculate Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=FCBH&DEDUPE=N&LGcode=MKTG&mc_id=website_catpage&icid=website_catpage#nbb "Calculate Now")
![Shoppers Stop Black Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving licence
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photograph


Address Proof
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  * Rental agreement 
  * Passport 
  * Aadhaar card 
  * Voter ID 


Income Proof
  * Salary slips (for salaried individuals) 
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR) 
  * Form 16 
  * Bank statements


## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
The Steps are:
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN 
  * Step 2 - Confirm your details 
  * Step 3 - Select your Card 
  * Step 3 - Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=FCBH&DEDUPE=N&LGcode=MKTG&mc_id=website_catpage&icid=website_catpage#nbb "Apply Now")
![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Card Control via MyCards
  2. ### Fees & Charges
  3. ### Card Reward and Redemption
  4. ### Redemption Limit (From January 1, 2023)
  5. ### Reward Points Validity
  6. ### Smart EMI 
  7. ### Zero Lost Card Liability 
  8. ### Revolving Credit 
  9. ### Card Control via MyCards

  11. ### Application Channels
  12. ### Value Chart for Customers


###  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/)**,** a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of your Regalia Gold Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up your Card PIN
  * Manage Card Controls like Online Spends, Contactless Transactions
  * View Transactions / Download e-Statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/ Re-Issue Your Card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, Manage, Set PIN and Card Controls for Add-on card


  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans 
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends
  * Reward Points  
View and redeem points at the push of a button


![Card Management and Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Charges 
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee – ₹4,500/- + Applicable Taxes  



[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-black-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to view details of the Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card Fees and Charges.
![Card Reward and Redemption Program](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Reward and Redemption 
  * Redeem Reward Points on NetBanking where 1 Reward point = 1 Rupee when redeemed against Shoppers Stop vouchers.
  * For other options please refer the table below:

  
| **Avenue of Redemption**  | **1 Reward Point Value**  |  
| --- | --- |  
| Product Catalogue  | 0.35  |  
| Cash Back  | 0.2  |  
| Airmiles  | Up to 0.5  |  
| Unified SmartBuy (Flights/Hotels)  | 0.5  |  
![Card Reward and Redemption Program](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Redemption Limit (From January 1, 2023) 
  * Accrual of Reward Points on Grocery Spends capped at 1000 points per month per customer.
  * No Reward Points accrual on spends made on Rental and Government category payments.
  * 1% Fees to be charged on Rental transactions - from the 2nd rental transaction done every calendar month.
  * 1% Mark-Up charges to be applied on all International DCC transactions.


![Redemption Limit \(From January 1, 2023\)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Reward Points Validity 
  * Reward Points are valid for 2 years.


[Click here,](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/services/claim-rewards) for further details on the process to redeem Reward Points
![Reward Points Validity](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Smart EMI 
  * You have the option to convert big spends into [SmartEMI](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi), after purchases on your Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card.
  * Enjoy attractive interest rates and conveniently repay over 9 to 36 months.
  * Get credit into your HDFC Bank Account in seconds.
  * The loan is pre-approved so no documentation is required.


![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Zero Lost Card Liability 
  * Available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre.


![Zero Cost Card Liability](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Revolving Credit 
The Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card offers revolving credit at a nominal interest rate. 
  * Revolving credit allows you to use a line of credit up to a specified limit without a fixed number of payments. 
  * You have the flexibility to use the funds as needed and only pay interest on the amount used. 
  * This facility ensures continuous access to funds, making it a valuable emergency cash reserve for unexpected financial challenges. 


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/), a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up Card PIN 
  * Manage card controls like online spends, contactless transactions
  * View Transactions/Download e-statements
  * Check Reward Points
  * Block/Re-issue card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, manage, set PIN and card controls for Add-on card


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/co-branded-most-important-terms-and-conditions-for-credit-cards.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-black-credit-card/pdfs/SS-Black-T-and-C-latest.pdf) for product specific T&C
  * [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-black-credit-card/pdfs/card-member-agreement-shoppers-stop-black.pdf) for Card Member Agreement Details
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/cards/services) to access all important links related to your Credit Card.
  * Important update: Please [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-black-credit-card/pdfs/shoppers-stop-black-product-aug-24.pdf) to view the revisions in T&C's of your HDFC Bank credit card applicable with effect from 1st Aug'2024
  * Important Update: Please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-black-credit-card/pdfs/t-and-c-for-shoppers-stop-black.pdf) to view the new product and feature related information applicable with effect from Mar 1, 2024.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your HDFC Bank Credit Card:
  * **1. Website  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=FCBH&LGcode=MKTG&icid=website_organic_herobanner_shoppersstopblackcreditcard:banner:applynow#nbb).
  * **2. NetBanking  
**If you're an existing HDFC Bank customer, simply[ log in(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/ "https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/") to NetBanking and apply from the ‘Cards’ section.
  * **3. HDFC Bank Branch  
**Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest [branch(opens in a new tab)](https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/ "https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/") and our staff will help you with the application.


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions 
### 
What is Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card?
Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card is a premium lifestyle perks offering Credit Card that offers exclusive fashion rewards and benefits on your Shoppers Stop and non-Shoppers Stop spends.
### 
What are the benefits of Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card?
The card offers 7% Reward points on every Shoppers Stop spend, 2% Reward points on every Non-Shoppers Stop spend, complimentary Shoppers Stop Black membership, lounge access, fuel surcharge waiver, premium benefits, smart EMI options, contactless payment, comprehensive insurance protection, and more.
### 
Is a Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card free?
The joining and renewal membership fee for Shoppers Stop Black Credit Card is ₹4,500 plus applicable taxes. Please check the fees and charges section for more details.
### 
What are the annual Fee and Charges for the Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card?
Membership Fee: ₹4,500 + applicable taxes
### 
How to Use the Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card? 
You can swipe or tap (in certain cases) your Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card in any place. Here are some instances: 
  * **Shopping:** Maximise the Reward Points by using the card for shopping at Shoppers Stop stores. 


  * **Pay for Fuel:** Use the card to pay for fuel and enjoy a 1% fuel waiver of up to ₹500, across all fuel stations in India. 


  * **Contactless Payments:** Leverage the convenience of contactless payments for transactions up to ₹5,000 at various retail outlets.


### 
How to Apply for the Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card? 
Apply for the Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card online by checking eligibility above Submit the required documents, online or by visiting your nearest branch. Upon approval, get your new Shoppers Stop Black HDFC Bank Credit Card.
## For More Frequently Asked Questions
